action_set_definitions.name: get_application_context
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current underwriting state for a specific application, including the applicant profile, existing underwriting status, and a list of all documents in the inventory with their current statuses.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application (e.g., APP-2024-APEX-XLR8).

action_set_definitions.name: fetch_risk_report_data
action_set_definitions.description: Extracts granular risk recommendation data from a specific Risk Control Report. This tool is capable of processing documents in both 'Verified' and 'Received' statuses to ensure the most recent data is available for review.

document_id.description: The unique ID of the Risk Control Report to be parsed.

action_set_definitions.name: update_underwriting_disposition
action_set_definitions.description: Submits the final renewal decision and updates the application state. It requires a detailed audit log entry justifying the decision based on specific recommendation ages and report versions.

application_id.description: The unique identifier for the application.

terminal_status.description: The final state of the underwriting process.

audit_trail_comment.description: A comprehensive log of the decision logic, including age calculations (relative to 2023-11-10) and document versioning.

state_description.application_id: Unique identifier for the insurance policy application.
state_description.applicant_profile: Demographic and professional information of the applicant.
state_description.underwriting_status: The current phase of the application (e.g., PENDING, IN_PROGRESS, FLAGGED, APPROVED, DECLINED).
state_description.risk_factors: A list of identified risks associated with the applicant (e.g., 'High BMI', 'Dangerous Hobby').
state_description.document_inventory: Mapping of required documents to their current status (e.g., 'Received', 'Missing', 'Verified').
state_description.internal_risk_score: Internal numeric score (0-100) representing the calculated risk level.
state_description.audit_trail: Chronological log of internal transitions and actions applied to this case.

risk_factors: Minor Oil Leak in Employee Parking (South)
audit_trail: 2021-08-10: Risk Engineering Survey conducted at North Warehouse. Rec #A-101 (Type A - Physical) issued: 'Upgrade overhead sprinkler density to 0.60 gpm/3000 sq ft'. MFL Impact: 70%.
2021-08-12: Survey at South Annex. Rec #SA-01 issued regarding smoking controls.
2022-09-15: Renewal Review: Broker claims Rec #A-101 is 'Closed' based on verbal update from plant manager. System status updated to 'Closed - Verified'.
2022-11-20: South Annex facility officially decommissioned. All Recs (SA-01) moved to 'Void - Property Sold'.

2023-01-05: Site Visit (Main Site): Inspector identifies Rec #A-101 was never started; 2022 closure was an error. Status reverted to 'Outstanding'. New Rec #H-202 (Human Element) issued: 'No logs for fire pump churn tests for 6 months'.
2023-06-12: Apex Thermal Solutions (Subsidiary) completes their 2023 survey. All subsidiary recs marked 'Closed'.

2023-10-28: Received rcr_apex_thermoforming_2023_v2_FINAL_AMENDED_CORRECTED. Report confirms North Warehouse storage has increased to 22ft, and Rec #A-101 remains unaddressed. Pump logs (Rec #H-202) still missing for North Warehouse.
2023-11-10: Current Evaluation Date. System pending final underwriter disposition.
